name: all-bg-go
description: Parallel fan-out trigger — user says "all bg go" (or equivalent) → print a plan table (branch · subagent_type · isolation · goal) then spawn one background Agent per branch in the same message. REACTIVE single fan-out of what the PRIOR turn offered. For a self-generating repeatable loop (enumerate next work → plan → fan-out → loop), use `/cycle` instead.
